title: excise DASHBOARD_DOMAIN + Operator Dashboard Keycloak client
description:
## Summary

Companion to #616 вАФ removes every remaining manifest/secret/test/doc trace of the standalone operator dashboard torn down in #555. The successor lives at `web.\${PROD_DOMAIN}/admin/monitoring`, served by the website pod.

## What's removed

- **Realm imports** (dev + mentolder + korczewski): the entire `Operator Dashboard` Keycloak client (`clientId=dashboard`) вАФ 65 lines per realm √Ч 3 = 195 lines.
- **`DASHBOARD_DOMAIN` env var**: both env files, schema, both `configmap-domains.yaml` overlays, both realm-import entrypoint scripts, `prod/patch-keycloak.yaml`'s KC env block, the prod-deploy envsubst list in `Taskfile.yml`, and the ArgoCD `ApplicationSet` env mapping.
- **`DASHBOARD_OIDC_SECRET`**: schema, `k3d/keycloak.yaml`, prod realm-import entrypoint var list, both `.secrets/<env>.yaml` inputs, both committed `sealed-secrets/<env>.yaml`.
- **`tests/prod/FA-31.sh`** rewritten вАФ smoke-tests the new `/admin/monitoring` auth gate instead of the deleted `dashboard.\${PROD_DOMAIN}` surface.
- **`art-library/README.md`** вАФ `dashboard-web` вЖТ `website`.
- **`PENTEST_OVERVIEW.md`** вАФ `Admin-Dashboard` rows for both domains repointed to `web.\${DOMAIN}/admin/monitoring`; also fixes the netpol-table naming bug (the namespace is `website-korczewski`, not `korczewski-website`).

## Intentional non-changes

- Plans/specs under `docs/superpowers/plans/` + `docs/superpowers/specs/` and the `tracking/pending/` JSONs still reference these names вАФ those are intentional historical archives.
- Existing Keycloak instances retain the dead `dashboard` client in their DB because `kc.sh import --override false` never deletes. Harmless (its redirect URI hostname doesn't resolve to anything anymore). Optional follow-up: `kcadm.sh delete clients/<id>` per cluster.

## Test plan

- [x] `task workspace:validate` (kustomize manifest dry-run)
- [x] `task test:all` вАФ 80 ok, 0 failed
- [x] `envsubst < realm-workspace-{mentolder,korczewski}.json` after `source env-resolve.sh <env>` leaves zero unresolved `\${...}`
- [x] `kustomize build` of `k3d/`, `prod-mentolder/`, `prod-korczewski/` each contains zero `DASHBOARD_DOMAIN` / `DASHBOARD_OIDC_SECRET` strings post-build
- [x] All 3 realm JSONs validate (`python -m json.tool`), each retains 8 clients, 0 with `clientId=dashboard`
- [ ] CI green
